tabs.label: Shared Shopping
tabs.headline: Designed for shopping together
tabs.description: Your customers already shop together — just outside your store. Appstract brings conversations, decisions, and collaboration directly into your webshop to increase engagement and conversion.

tabs.label: Conversion
tabs.headline: When Customers Shop Together, They Buy More
tabs.description: Enable real-time shared shopping where customers invite friends, compare products, and decide together — driving larger baskets and higher conversion rates.

tabs.label: Customer Acquisition
tabs.headline: Let Your Customers Do the Acquisition
tabs.description: Instead of sending links on messaging apps, shoppers can invite friends directly into your store. Turn every visitor into a new acquisition channel.

tabs.label: Retention
tabs.headline: Keep Conversations Inside Your Store
tabs.description: Customers naturally discuss purchases with friends. Appstract ensures those conversations—and the buying decisions—happen on your site, not on messaging platforms.
